name: Fried Chicken Breast
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix bread crumbs, parsley, salt, garlic powder, onion powder, seasoning salt, yogurt, flour, and egg white in a pie plate.
2. Dip each chicken breast into the yogurt mixture, then coat with flour, and finally dip again in the egg white.
3. Roll the coated chicken in the breadcrumb mixture until well covered.
4. Place the breaded chicken breasts on a baking pan sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
5. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 45 to 60 minutes.
